finding_used: Usage-associated resistance increased immediately and continued increasing for at least four years.
interpretation: Supports including a future-pressure scenario, but does not identify class-specific causal coefficients for this EARS-Net policy model.
reference: Rahman S, Kesselheim AS, Hollis A. Persistence of resistance: a panel data analysis of the effect of antibiotic usage on the prevalence of resistance. Journal of Antibiotics. 2023;76:270-278.
